narrative:
Tallmadge 1-C (precinct in Summit County) has 1,088 registered voters, with 55.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.2%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.9 percentage points.
